requirement_topic.en: Mandatory Energy Label — MINEM Etiqueta de Eficiencia Energética (Star Rating)
requirement_topic.zh: 强制能效标签——MINEM能源效率标签（星级评定）
requirement_topic.zht: 強制能效標籤——MINEM能源效率標籤（星級評定）

summary.en: Peru's Ministry of Energy and Mines (MINEM) mandates an energy efficiency label (Etiqueta de Eficiencia Energética) for air conditioners sold in the Peruvian market. The label uses a star-rating scale and must be affixed to the product at the point of sale. Labelling requirements are established under MINEM resolutions and apply to split air-conditioning and heat pump systems. The label must reflect energy performance measured at 60 Hz, the Peruvian grid frequency, and use Spanish-language content meeting MINEM format specifications.
summary.zh: 秘鲁能源和矿业部（MINEM）规定在秘鲁市场销售的空调必须张贴能源效率标签（Etiqueta de Eficiencia Energética），采用星级评定制度，须在销售点贴于产品上。标签要求依据MINEM决议制定，适用于分体式空调及热泵系统。标签须反映在秘鲁电网频率60 Hz下测量的能效，并采用符合MINEM格式规范的西班牙语内容。
summary.zht: 秘魯能源和礦業部（MINEM）規定在秘魯市場銷售的空調必須張貼能源效率標籤（Etiqueta de Eficiencia Energética），採用星級評定制度，須在銷售點貼於產品上。標籤要求依據MINEM決議制定，適用於分體式空調及熱泵系統。標籤須反映在秘魯電網頻率60 Hz下測量的能效，並採用符合MINEM格式規範的西班牙語內容。

standards_or_laws: Reglamento de Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energética de Artefactos de Uso Doméstico (MINEM)
Decreto Supremo que aprueba el Reglamento de Eficiencia Energética (MINEM)
NTP applicable to air-conditioner energy performance at 60 Hz

summary.en: China requires a mandatory energy efficiency label (China Energy Label, CEL) for household air conditioners under applicable MEPS and labelling regulations, based on GB/T 7725 and GB 25454 efficiency test standards at 50 Hz. The Chinese energy label format, star-rating methodology, and 50 Hz test conditions are not transferable to Peru's 60 Hz mandatory label requirements. A new energy performance test at 60 Hz and a MINEM-compliant Spanish-language label are required.
summary.zh: 中国依据GB/T 7725和GB 25454效率测试标准（50 Hz），对家用空调实施强制能效标签（中国能效标识）和最低能效标准。中国能效标签格式、星级评定方法和50 Hz测试条件不能直接用于秘鲁60 Hz强制标签要求。须重新在60 Hz条件下测试能效并制作符合MINEM要求的西班牙语标签。
summary.zht: 中國依據GB/T 7725和GB 25454效率測試標準（50 Hz），對家用空調實施強制能效標籤（中國能效標識）和最低能效標準。中國能效標籤格式、星級評定方法和50 Hz測試條件不能直接用於秘魯60 Hz強制標籤要求。須重新在60 Hz條件下測試能效並製作符合MINEM要求的西班牙語標籤。

standards_or_laws: GB 25454 (household air conditioner energy efficiency limits and grades)
GB/T 7725 (room air conditioners performance test method, 50 Hz)

gap.en: Chinese energy labels and 50 Hz test data cannot substitute Peru's mandatory energy label. Exporters must retest the product at 60 Hz in accordance with MINEM-recognised test standards, calculate the applicable star rating, and produce a Spanish-language label meeting MINEM format requirements. The compressor and motor must be confirmed or redesigned for 60 Hz operation before energy testing is meaningful.
gap.zh: 中国能效标签和50 Hz测试数据不能替代秘鲁强制能效标签。出口商须按MINEM认可的测试标准在60 Hz条件下重新测试产品，计算适用星级，并制作符合MINEM格式要求的西班牙语标签。在进行有意义的能效测试之前，须先确认或重新设计压缩机和电机以适应60 Hz运行。
gap.zht: 中國能效標籤和50 Hz測試數據不能替代秘魯強制能效標籤。出口商須按MINEM認可的測試標準在60 Hz條件下重新測試產品，計算適用星級，並製作符合MINEM格式要求的西班牙語標籤。在進行有意義的能效測試之前，須先確認或重新設計壓縮機和電機以適應60 Hz運行。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — MINEM energy label required at point of sale for air conditioners and heat pumps
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory China Energy Label (CEL) at 50 Hz; not equivalent to Peru 60 Hz MINEM label

source.publisher: MINEM — Ministerio de Energía y Minas, Peru

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — Chinese energy label and 50 Hz test results do not satisfy Peru's MINEM mandatory energy label; 60 Hz retesting and Spanish-language label production are required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——中国能效标签和50 Hz测试结果不满足秘鲁MINEM强制能效标签要求；须在60 Hz条件下重新测试并制作西班牙语标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——中國能效標籤和50 Hz測試結果不滿足秘魯MINEM強制能效標籤要求；須在60 Hz條件下重新測試並製作西班牙語標籤。

requirement_topic.en: MEPS / Minimum Energy Performance Standards — EER Thresholds under MINEM
requirement_topic.zh: 最低能效标准（MEPS）/ 能效比（EER）门槛——MINEM规定
requirement_topic.zht: 最低能效標準（MEPS）/ 能效比（EER）門檻——MINEM規定

summary.en: MINEM establishes minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) for air conditioners sold in Peru, including minimum EER (Energy Efficiency Ratio) thresholds that products must meet to be legally placed on the market. Products that fail to meet the applicable MEPS threshold cannot be imported or sold. EER thresholds apply to the product's 60 Hz performance; test data generated at 50 Hz does not satisfy the MEPS verification requirement. OSINERGMIN monitors energy sector compliance and may interact with MEPS enforcement.
summary.zh: MINEM为在秘鲁销售的空调制定最低能效标准（MEPS），包括产品合法进入市场须达到的最低能效比（EER）门槛。未能达到适用MEPS门槛的产品不得进口或销售。EER门槛适用于产品的60 Hz性能；在50 Hz下生成的测试数据不满足MEPS核查要求。OSINERGMIN监督能源行业合规情况，可能与MEPS执法存在交互。
summary.zht: MINEM為在秘魯銷售的空調制定最低能效標準（MEPS），包括產品合法進入市場須達到的最低能效比（EER）門檻。未能達到適用MEPS門檻的產品不得進口或銷售。EER門檻適用於產品的60 Hz性能；在50 Hz下生成的測試數據不滿足MEPS核查要求。OSINERGMIN監督能源行業合規情況，可能與MEPS執法存在交互。

standards_or_laws: Reglamento de Eficiencia Energética — MINEM Decreto Supremo
MEPS thresholds for air conditioners (EER, COP) established by MINEM resolutions
OSINERGMIN supervisory framework for energy sector

summary.en: China enforces MEPS for room air conditioners under GB 25454, specifying minimum energy efficiency grades and COP/EER thresholds for products sold in China, all measured at 50 Hz. Chinese MEPS grades and GB 25454 / GB/T 7725 test results at 50 Hz are not transferable as evidence of Peru MEPS compliance, because the operating frequency, test protocol, and regulatory threshold structure differ.
summary.zh: 中国依据GB 25454对房间空调实施MEPS，规定在中国销售产品的最低能效等级和COP/EER门槛，均在50 Hz下测量。中国MEPS等级及50 Hz下的GB 25454 / GB/T 7725测试结果不能作为秘鲁MEPS合规的证明，因为运行频率、测试规程和法规门槛结构均不同。
summary.zht: 中國依據GB 25454對房間空調實施MEPS，規定在中國銷售產品的最低能效等級和COP/EER門檻，均在50 Hz下測量。中國MEPS等級及50 Hz下的GB 25454 / GB/T 7725測試結果不能作為秘魯MEPS合規的證明，因為運行頻率、測試規程和法規門檻結構均不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 25454 (minimum energy efficiency limits and grades for household air conditioners)
GB/T 7725 (room air conditioner performance test method, 50 Hz)

gap.en: Chinese GB 25454 MEPS evidence at 50 Hz does not satisfy Peru MEPS requirements. The product must be tested at 60 Hz after compressor and motor compatibility with 60 Hz has been confirmed. Exporters should verify current MINEM EER threshold values and applicable product category scope before testing, as MEPS values are updated by ministerial resolution.
gap.zh: 中国50 Hz下的GB 25454 MEPS证明不满足秘鲁MEPS要求。确认压缩机和电机与60 Hz兼容后，须在60 Hz条件下测试产品。出口商在测试前应核验现行MINEM EER门槛值和适用产品类别范围，因MEPS值可能通过部长令更新。
gap.zht: 中國50 Hz下的GB 25454 MEPS證明不滿足秘魯MEPS要求。確認壓縮機和電機與60 Hz相容後，須在60 Hz條件下測試產品。出口商在測試前應核驗現行MINEM EER門檻值和適用產品類別範圍，因MEPS值可能通過部長令更新。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — products below MEPS EER threshold may not be imported or sold in Peru
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under GB 25454 at 50 Hz; not equivalent to Peru 60 Hz MEPS

source.publisher: MINEM — Ministerio de Energía y Minas, Peru

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — Peru MEPS EER thresholds apply at 60 Hz; Chinese 50 Hz MEPS data is not transferable; 60 Hz testing and current MINEM threshold verification are required before import.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——秘鲁MEPS EER门槛适用于60 Hz；中国50 Hz MEPS数据不可转移；进口前须进行60 Hz测试并核验现行MINEM门槛。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——秘魯MEPS EER門檻適用於60 Hz；中國50 Hz MEPS數據不可轉移；進口前須進行60 Hz測試並核驗現行MINEM門檻。
